§ 01Key Assumptions

Note: The purchase price is based on an independent appraisal by the ESOP trustee's valuation firm. Final FMV is confirmed upon delivery of the appraisal report and is subject to trustee approval.
§ 02Capital Stack

The transaction is funded through a combination of senior debt, mezzanine financing, a seller note, and ESOP equity:

SourceAmount
Senior Debt (Bank / SBA){{seniorDebt}}
Mezzanine Financing{{mezzanine}}
Seller Note{{sellerNote}}
ESOP Equity{{esopEquity}}
Total Capital Stack{{purchasePrice}}
§ 03Seller Proceeds
ComponentAmount
Day 1 Cash at Closing{{day1Cash}}
Deferred Payment (Seller Note){{deferredPayment}}
Equity Rollover{{equityRollover}}
Structure note: Day 1 cash is wired at closing. The seller note is repaid per its terms over the agreed period. Equity rollover, if applicable, represents retained ownership in the operating company post-close.
§ 04Timeline
{{loiDate}}
{{targetClosing}}

These dates are indicative. The closing timeline depends on lender underwriting, trustee appraisal, ERISA counsel review, and SBA approval. Forhemit coordinates all parties to maintain the target schedule.

§ 05Important Disclosures
Indicative only. All figures in this summary are indicative and subject to change based on the independent appraisal, lender underwriting, and final deal terms. This document does not constitute a binding offer or commitment.
Tax deferral. If the seller elects §1042 treatment, capital gains tax may be deferred on the sale proceeds. The seller's CPA should verify eligibility and model the specific tax impact.
—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
